violations.text: Observed establishment lacking allergen statement on menu. PIC will provide an allergy awareness sign for consumers. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH CFP at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

The back door to the outside, located in the (storage/warewashing area), is not tight-fitting. Observed back door sweep broken/needs adjustment. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025
